title: Optimizing Context Performance
description: Techniques to avoid widespread re‑renders with Context.

slides.title: Context Re‑renders 🔄
Memoizing Context Value
slides.content: Prevent the context value from changing on every render of the provider.

quizData.question: What happens to all consumers when a context value changes?

options.text: React optimizes and only updates changed parts

quizData.explanation: All components that use `useContext` on that context re‑render, which is why splitting is important.
